content.text:
Looking at the image, the track runs straight ahead with the car positioned very close to the left edge (white line clearly visible on the left), needing to move right toward center.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 115, target = (115 + 5) % 121 = 120
- Target WP120: x=2.6104, y=0.6809
- Car: x=2.5245, y=0.9561, heading=14.058°
- dy = 0.6809 - 0.9561 = -0.2752
- dx = 2.6104 - 2.5245 = 0.0859
- bearing = atan2(-0.2752, 0.0859) = -72.65°
- delta = -72.65° - 14.058° = -86.71°
- Normalize: -86.71° → waypoint is sharply to the RIGHT → use strong negative steering

Delta = -86.71°, very sharp right correction needed — car is significantly left of center and heading is too far north.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is far left of center (y=0.956 vs centerline y=0.68) with heading 14° but target waypoint is nearly due east at bearing -72.65°, giving delta=-86.71°, requiring maximum right steering at reduced speed to get back on the centerline.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.68 on this straight section; car y~0.956 means car is well left of center",
    "Car has been drifting left persistently (y: 0.847→0.875→0.920→0.956) — strong right correction needed",
    "When delta > 50°, use speed=0.75-1.0 and steering=-25 to avoid going off track",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "Once delta < 5°, switch to 0 steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Progress 97% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Previous -15 steering was insufficient to correct leftward drift — need stronger correction",
    "Sharp delta >80° requires max steering -25 at speed 0.75"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.324, 2.430, 2.525],
    "y": [0.875, 0.920, 0.956],
    "yaw": [4.40, 11.16, 14.06]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP120 at (2.610, 0.681): dy=-0.275, dx=0.086, bearing=-72.65°, delta=-86.71° → sharp right correction needed",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
